# umay.dev

> umay.dev is a digital studio specializing in mobile apps, AI-powered tools, and creative software experiments. We design and ship products to the Apple App Store and Google Play Store using Flutter, Swift, Python, and Firebase.

## Active Products

### Pulse Guard
WiFi-based home security app for macOS. Uses your MacBook's WiFi signals to detect human presence without cameras or extra hardware. Features include real-time monitoring, customizable alerts, and zone-based detection using WiFi Channel State Information (CSI) analysis.
- Platform: macOS
- Category: Security & Privacy
- URL: https://umay.dev/pulseguard/

### Pulse Home
WiFi smart home automation app for macOS. Create custom rules, Apple HomeKit integration, webhooks, and geofence triggers using your Mac as the hub.
- Platform: macOS
- Category: Home Automation
- URL: https://umay.dev/pulsehome/

### ShadowART
Jungian shadow work journal and mood tracker for iOS. AI-guided self-reflection through Carl Jung's archetypes, real-time sentiment analysis, mood tracking, dream journaling, and guided audio sessions. Privacy-first with 100% on-device processing using Apple Core ML.
- Platform: iOS
- Category: Health & Wellness, Mental Health
- URL: https://umay.dev/shadowart/

### MindType
Decision mirror app for iOS. Game theory micro-games based on Nash Equilibrium and Prisoner's Dilemma that reveal thinking patterns, cognitive archetypes, and decision-making biases.
- Platform: iOS
- Category: Psychology, Games
- URL: https://umay.dev/mindtype/

### Brolled
Meme maker app for iOS. Six viral tools in one app including texting stories, fake chats, meme sounds, comment overlays, and time cards. Built for content creators on TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube Shorts.
- Platform: iOS
- Category: Entertainment, Video
- URL: https://umay.dev/brolled/

### Fenno
Private voice mirror app for iOS. Real-time vocal analysis that helps you hear how you really sound. Features include tone analysis, pace tracking, filler word detection, emotional pattern recognition, and voice pulse visualization. 100% on-device processing — no recordings stored, no data leaves your device. Subscription and lifetime purchase options available.
- Platform: iOS
- Category: Productivity, Self-Improvement
- URL: https://umay.dev/fenno/
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/fenno-private-voice-mirror/id6761913486

## Blog & Technical Writing

### Why We Built Pulse Guard: WiFi-Based Home Security Without Cameras
How WiFi Channel State Information (CSI) analysis enables camera-free home security. Covers the privacy motivation, technical approach using radio wave disturbance patterns, and real-world applications.
- URL: https://umay.dev/blog/why-we-built-pulse-guard.html

### Turning Your Mac Into a Smart Home Hub with Pulse Home
Why a Mac makes an ideal smart home controller. Explains HomeKit integration, webhook automation, geofence triggers, and custom rule engines for home automation.
- URL: https://umay.dev/blog/turning-your-mac-into-a-smart-home-hub.html

### How ShadowART Uses AI for Jungian Self-Reflection
Building an AI-powered shadow work journal combining Carl Jung's archetypes with on-device Core ML. Covers sentiment analysis, archetype mapping, dream journaling, and privacy-first AI processing.
- URL: https://umay.dev/blog/how-shadowart-uses-ai-for-self-reflection.html

### Game Theory as a Mirror for Your Mind: The Story of MindType
Using Nash Equilibrium and the Prisoner's Dilemma to reveal cognitive patterns. Explains how game theory micro-games map to real-world decision-making biases and thinking archetypes.
- URL: https://umay.dev/blog/game-theory-as-a-mirror-for-your-mind.html

### Building the Ultimate Meme Maker: Inside Brolled
Behind the scenes of building a six-in-one viral content toolkit for TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube Shorts creators. Covers texting stories, fake chats, meme sounds, and content creation workflows.
- URL: https://umay.dev/blog/building-the-ultimate-meme-maker.html

## About umay.dev

- Studio: umay.dev
- Focus: Mobile Apps, AI-Powered Tools, Creative Software
- Technologies: Flutter, Dart, Swift, SwiftUI, Kotlin, Python, Firebase, AI/ML, Core ML, NLP, HomeKit, REST APIs
- Twitter/X: https://x.com/yumaydev
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/umay.dev
- Website: https://umay.dev
- Blog: https://umay.dev/blog/

## Contact

For business inquiries, collaborations, or press: visit https://umay.dev or reach out via Twitter/X @yumaydev.
